'''Mastala''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]' [[Garnib system/Legends|Garnib system]]. It was [[Temperature/Legends|frigid]] and rocky.<ref name="PoG1" /> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] named a [[Mastala (DP20 gunship)|ship]] after it.<ref name="TABSB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
